channel.title: Create an official frontity tutorial
channel.description:
**--- [Feature Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Create-an-official-frontity-tutorial-2e30027969044da0911603174f15e36d)**
## Description Currently the docs lack a comprehensive "zero to production" tutorial. I believe that for most devs it's the single most valuable resource when learning a new framework.
Gatsby is a good example, they have a very detailed tutorial that developers love.
In a [survey](https://community.frontity.org/t/create-a-1-click-frontity-wp-deployment/962) (small sample of people but still) people list the documentation as the the thing they like most about Gatsby (together with 3 other things like being react-based)
## Examples https://www.gatsbyjs.org/tutorial/
## User Stories > As a **new frontity user** > I want to **have access to an official tutorial** > so that **I can undertand frontity quicker and more easily**
<!-- ------------------------------------------------------------------------ --> <!-- This will be filled by the Frontity team, please do not remove it --> <!-- ------------------------------------------------------------------------
## GitHub Issues - [Issue](####) -->

item.title: Create an official frontity tutorial
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Tutorial done and available at https://tutorial.frontity.org/

Read full topic

item.title: Create an official frontity tutorial
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Agreed, this is very important.

React also has a good introductory tutorial: https://reactjs.org/tutorial/tutorial.html

Read full topic

item.title: Create an official frontity tutorial
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
— Feature Card

Description

Currently the docs lack a comprehensive “zero to production” tutorial. I believe that for most devs it’s the single most valuable resource when learning a new framework.

Gatsby is a good example, they have a very detailed tutorial that developers love.

In a survey (small sample of people but still) people list the documentation as the the thing they like most about Gatsby (together with 3 other things like being react-based)

Examples

GatsbyJS

Gatsby.js Tutorials

Welcome to Gatsby! We’re glad you’re here. The goal of this tutorial is to guide you through setting up and deploying your first Gatsby site…

Reading time: 2 min read

User Stories

As a new frontity user
I want to have access to an official tutorial
so that I can undertand frontity quicker and more easily

Read full topic
